description: Per-profile binary-size and cold-start SLO baselines. Gate fails when any metric exceeds its budget. Baselines captured from deterministic release builds on reference hardware.

governance.update_policy: Baseline changes require explicit rationale in commit message and must reference the build/bench run that justifies the new values. Use 'make release && size build/lib/libasx.a' and 'make bench-json' to capture new baselines.
governance.tolerance_policy: Size budgets use headroom multipliers to absorb compiler version differences, new features, and CI variance. Cold-start budgets use larger headroom due to OS scheduling noise.

audit_trail.author: FoggyForge
audit_trail.rationale: First size/cold-start baseline from CORE profile release build on development host (x86_64, GCC). Archive size budget set to 2x baseline to allow feature growth. Text budget set to 1.5x for tighter code-size control. Cold-start budgets use 10x headroom for CI runner variance.

first_task_p99_ns.description: p99 full cold-start to first task completion

first_task_p99_9_ns.description: p99.9 full cold-start to first task completion
